name: Onboarding Agent
description: Executes strict Plan-then-Execute employee onboarding workflows from a single natural language instruction. Decomposes the request into ordered steps, runs each tool, retries on failure, and produces a full audit log.

skills.name: Employee Onboarding Orchestrator
skills.description: Decomposes unstructured onboarding requests into a strict, sequential plan and executes it using five tools: account provisioner, welcome email composer, calendar scheduler, document generator, and onboarding tracker. Handles failures with intelligent retry and graceful escalation.
examples: Onboard Sarah Connor to the Cybersecurity team starting next Monday.
Set up a new employee John Smith joining the Engineering department on 2026-04-01 as a Senior Engineer.
Complete full onboarding for Maria Garcia, starting in the Product team on 2026-05-15.
